THEUNDERSTUDY-UNDERSTUDY_STRIKE.title: Strike
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNDERSTUDY_DEFEND.title: Defend
THEUNDERSTUDY-WORKSHOP.title: Workshop
THEUNDERSTUDY-WORKSHOP.description:
Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills in your discard pile.
THEUNDERSTUDY-WARM_UP.title: Warm Up
THEUNDERSTUDY-FREEZE_UP.title: Freeze Up
THEUNDERSTUDY-FREEZE_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Weak:inverseDiff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-DESPERATE_STRIKE.title: Desperate Strike
THEUNDERSTUDY-MOVE_ON.title: Move On
THEUNDERSTUDY-MOVE_ON.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Invert[/gold] 2 of the last modified invertible debuff.
THEUNDERSTUDY-PRACTICE_STRIKE.title: Practice Strike
THEUNDERSTUDY-PRACTICE_STRIKE.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to 1 attack or skill in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-DEVELOPMENT.title: Development
THEUNDERSTUDY-DEVELOPMENT.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} {Select:plural:attack or skill|attacks and skills} in your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REHEARSE.title: Rehearse
THEUNDERSTUDY-REHEARSE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills in your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INNOVATION.title: Innovation
THEUNDERSTUDY-INNOVATION.description: Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] and [gold]Tuned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} {Select:plural:attack or skill|attacks and skills} in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BLACKOUT.title: Blackout
THEUNDERSTUDY-BLACKOUT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Limited:inverseDiff()} [gold]Limited[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ALL_NIGHTER.title: All-Nighter
THEUNDERSTUDY-ALL_NIGHTER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Apply {Jaded:inverseDiff()} [gold]Jaded[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MUST_GO_ON.title: Must Go On
THEUNDERSTUDY-MISSED_CUE.title: Missed Cue
THEUNDERSTUDY-MISSED_CUE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Apply {Shaken:inverseDiff()} [gold]Shaken[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-STAGE_FRIGHT.title: Stage Fright
THEUNDERSTUDY-STAGE_FRIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {Shaken:inverseDiff()} [gold]Shaken[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BREATHER.title: Breather
THEUNDERSTUDY-BREATHER.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from 2 attacks and skills in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_TWO.title: Take Two
THEUNDERSTUDY-TAKE_TWO.description: Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from {Select:diff()} {Select:plural:attack or skill|attacks and skills} in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BUY_TIME.title: Buy Time
THEUNDERSTUDY-BUY_TIME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from {Select:diff()} attacks and skills in your draw pile.
Apply {Limited:inverseDiff()} [gold]Limited[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRYING_OUT_LOUD.title: Crying Out Loud
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRYING_OUT_LOUD.descriptio: Whenever a buff or debuff of yours clears, gain {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-PREVIEW.title: Preview
THEUNDERSTUDY-PREVIEW.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} {Select:plural:attack or skill|attacks and skills} in your draw pile.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BALANCED.title: Balanced
THEUNDERSTUDY-BALANCED.description: Whenever a card becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold], remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from 1 {IfUpgraded:show:attack or skill of your choice|random attack or skill} in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BALANCED.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ARRANGEMENT.title: Arrangement
THEUNDERSTUDY-ARRANGEMENT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to 2 attacks and skills in your discard pile.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ONE_UP.title: One-up
THEUNDERSTUDY-ONE_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to this card.
THEUNDERSTUDY-DA_CAPO.title: Da Capo
THEUNDERSTUDY-DA_CAPO.description:
Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, at most once per turn.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to each card played this way.
THEUNDERSTUDY-WIND_UP.title: Wind Up
THEUNDERSTUDY-WIND_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {Weak:inverseDiff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to yourself.
Gain {Vigor:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-DOUBLE_TIME.title: Double Time
THEUNDERSTUDY-DOUBLE_TIME.description: All [gold]invertible[/gold] buff and debuff gains are applied {DoubleTimePower:diff()} additional {DoubleTimePower:plural:time|times}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-LOOSEN_UP.title: Loosen Up
THEUNDERSTUDY-LOOSEN_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for each [gold]Unplayable[/gold] in hand.
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all attacks and skills in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-HAVE_FUN.title: Have Fun
THEUNDERSTUDY-HAVE_FUN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Invert[/gold] 2 of the last modified invertible debuff.
THEUNDERSTUDY-STRIKE_A_POSE.title: Strike a Pose
THEUNDERSTUDY-STRIKE_A_POSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Invert[/gold] {Invert:diff()} of each invertible debuff you have.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FOLK_SONG.title: Folk Song
THEUNDERSTUDY-LOVE_SONG.title: Love Song
THEUNDERSTUDY-SAD_SONG.title: Sad Song
THEUNDERSTUDY-POP_SONG.title: Pop Song
THEUNDERSTUDY-OLD_SONG.title: Old Song
THEUNDERSTUDY-CENTER_STAGE.title: Center Stage
THEUNDERSTUDY-CENTER_STAGE.description:
Apply {SelfDebuff:inverseDiff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], [gold]Shaken[/gold], [gold]Jaded[/gold], and [gold]Limited[/gold] to yourself.
At the start of next turn, [gold]Invert[/gold] {CenterStagePower:diff()} of each invertible debuff.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MASTER_FORM.title: Master Form
THEUNDERSTUDY-MASTER_FORM.description: When attacks or skills without [gold]Replay[/gold] become [gold]Unplayable[/gold], they gain [gold]Replay[/gold] 1.
THEUNDERSTUDY-HELD_NOTE.title: Held Note
THEUNDERSTUDY-HELD_NOTE.description: [gold]Invertible[/gold] debuffs and buffs no longer decrease by 1 each turn.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SHOWTIME.title: Showtime
THEUNDERSTUDY-SHOWTIME.description: Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, at most once per turn.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SELL_OUT.title: Sell Out
THEUNDERSTUDY-SELL_OUT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Planned[/gold] card you have.
Exhaust all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.
THEUNDERSTUDY-OWN_IT.title: Own It
THEUNDERSTUDY-OWN_IT.description:
[gold]Invert[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} of each invertible debuff you have.
Gain each inverted buff X more times.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SONIC_BOOM.title: Sonic Boom
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_FIRST_LESSON.title: The First Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-ANOTHER_BRICK.title: Another Brick
THEUNDERSTUDY-ANOTHER_BRICK.description: Whenever a debuff is applied to you, gain {AnotherBrickPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-SHOWSTOPPER.title: Showstopper
THEUNDERSTUDY-MEDLEY.title: Medley
THEUNDERSTUDY-MEDLEY.description: Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in a random order, at most once per turn.
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_SECOND_LESSON.title: The Second Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_SECOND_LESSON.descript:
Obey my [red][sine]Orders[/sine][/red], and be [gold]Rewarded[/gold].
Otherwise, you'll be [gold]Punished[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_FINAL_LESSON.title: The Final Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_FINAL_LESSON.descripti:
Why are you hurting?
[red][jitter]Stop getting hurt[/jitter][/red].
This will all be over soon. To the count of [red][jitter]3[/jitter][/red].
THEUNDERSTUDY-MY_OWN_LESSON.title: My Own Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-MY_OWN_LESSON.description:
[gold]Invertible[/gold] debuff gains become buffs.
[gold]Invertible[/gold] buff gains become debuffs.
THEUNDERSTUDY-HEART_ACHE.title: Heart Ache
THEUNDERSTUDY-HEART_ACHE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Vulnerable:inverseDiff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-DRAWING_BLANKS.title: Drawing Blanks
THEUNDERSTUDY-START_OVER.title: Start Over
THEUNDERSTUDY-MAGNUM_OPUS.title: Magnum Opus
THEUNDERSTUDY-MAGNUM_OPUS.description: Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} attacks or skills in your draw pile.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MOTIF.title: Motif
THEUNDERSTUDY-MOTIF.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to this card.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ALL_HANDS.title: All Hands
THEUNDERSTUDY-ALL_HANDS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to all attacks and skills in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MEMORIZE.title: Memorize
THEUNDERSTUDY-MEMORIZE.description: Apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to all attacks and skills with [gold]Unplayable[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-FORTE.title: Forte
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRASH.title: Crash
THEUNDERSTUDY-SUBVERSION.title: Subversion
THEUNDERSTUDY-SUBVERSION.description:
[gold]Invert[/gold] {Invert:diff()} of the last modified invertible debuff.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to 1 attack or skill in your discard pile.
THEUNDERSTUDY-JOKE.title: Joke
THEUNDERSTUDY-JOKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Invert[/gold] {Invert:diff()} of the last modified invertible debuff.
Apply {Vulnerable:inverseDiff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-RUNNING_ON_FUMES.title: Running on Fumes
THEUNDERSTUDY-RUNNING_ON_FUMES.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Jaded:inverseDiff()} [gold]Jaded[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-PLAYLIST.title: Playlist
THEUNDERSTUDY-CONFIDENCE.title: Confidence
THEUNDERSTUDY-CONFIDENCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from {Select:diff()} {Select:plural:attack or skill|attacks and skills} in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MUSE.title: Muse
THEUNDERSTUDY-MUSE.description: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SCHEDULE.title: Schedule
THEUNDERSTUDY-SCHEDULE.description: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to a card.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MUSCLE_MEMORY.title: Muscle Memory
THEUNDERSTUDY-IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
THEUNDERSTUDY-IMPROVISE.description:
For each [gold]Planned[/gold] card, draw 1 card.
{IfUpgraded:show:Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.|Remove [gold]Planned[/gold] from all cards.}
THEUNDERSTUDY-CANONICAL.title: Canonical
THEUNDERSTUDY-CANONICAL.description: Apply [gold]Stable[/gold] to 1 card in your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CLEAN_SLATE.title: Clean Slate
THEUNDERSTUDY-CLEAN_SLATE.description:
{InCombat:cond:|[gold]Tuned[/gold] 1.
}Exhaust all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each exhausted.
THEUNDERSTUDY-EXPERIENCE.title: Experience
THEUNDERSTUDY-SECOND_NATURE.title: Second Nature
THEUNDERSTUDY-SECOND_NATURE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the end of your turn, if this is [gold]Unplayable[/gold], remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] and play it.
THEUNDERSTUDY-WRITERS_BLOCK.title: Writer's Block
THEUNDERSTUDY-BREAK_A_LEG.title: Break a Leg
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_SHAKES.title: The Shakes
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_SHAKES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Shaken:inverseDiff()} [gold]Shaken[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRIB_NOTES.title: Crib Notes
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRIB_NOTES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to 1 attack or skill in hand.
Apply {Limited:inverseDiff()} [gold]Limited[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-PROCRASTINATE.title: Procrastinate
THEUNDERSTUDY-PROCRASTINATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to 1 attack or skill in your draw pile.
Apply {Jaded:inverseDiff()} [gold]Jaded[/gold] to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-APATHY.title: Apathy
THEUNDERSTUDY-APATHY.description: [gold]Invertible[/gold] debuffs applied to you are reduced by {ApathyPower:diff()}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ONE_TAKE.title: One Take
THEUNDERSTUDY-ONE_TAKE.description: Decrease all card costs by 1. Apply [gold]Unplayable[/gold] to every played card.
THEUNDERSTUDY-PATHOS.title: Pathos
THEUNDERSTUDY-PATHOS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] to yourself and ALL enemies.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BRIGHT_SIDE.title: Bright Side
THEUNDERSTUDY-BRIGHT_SIDE.description: At the end of your turn, Invert {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} random [gold]invertible[/gold] debuff you currently have.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRESCENDO.title: Crescendo
THEUNDERSTUDY-VENUE.title: Venue
THEUNDERSTUDY-VENUE.description: When you end your turn without playing any card, play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_WALL.title: The Wall
THEUNDERSTUDY-TUNING_RITUAL.title: Tuning Ritual
THEUNDERSTUDY-TUNING_RITUAL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SIGNATURE.title: Signature
THEUNDERSTUDY-SIGNATURE.description:
{InCombat:cond:|[gold]Tuned[/gold] 1.
}Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Starts each combat [gold]Planned[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-AUTO_TUNE.title: Auto Tune
THEUNDERSTUDY-AUTO_TUNE.description:
Cards without [gold]Tuned[/gold] cannot become [gold]Tuned[/gold].
At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to all [gold]Tuned[/gold] cards.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FATE.title: Fate Knocking
THEUNDERSTUDY-FATE.description:
[gold]Stable[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
Deal damage equal to the sum of the damage this card has dealt this combat.
